title: Handling Missing Data
content_md:
# Missing Data in Pandas

Data is rarely perfect. Clean it before ML.

```python
df.isnull().sum()
df.dropna()
df.fillna(0)
```

questions.question: How do you drop rows with missing values?
Why must missing data be handled before ML?
questions.answer: It affects model accuracy and training.

questions.question: Write code to fill missing ages with 30.
